description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Automatic Builds that triggers on push events. Run two jobs in parallel, one on ubuntu-latest and one on windows-latest. On ubuntu-latest, install wxWidgets, checkout the code, compile it with make, and upload the result as noods-linux. On windows-latest, download and compile wxWidgets, checkout the code, compile it with msbuild, and upload the result as noods-windows.
